name: imfd-marketplace
description: Private Claude Code marketplace for the IMFD team: shared skills, agents, and connectors that standardize how we develop.

plugins.name: dev-workflow
plugins.description: Team standard for the git/PR/review lifecycle: commit messages, PR descriptions, pre-merge review, and backend->frontend handoff.

plugins.name: marketplace-authoring
plugins.description: Meta-tooling to create and modify the marketplace itself: scaffold plugins, skills, subagents, and MCP connectors, then validate before publishing.

plugins.name: team-standards
plugins.description: Injects the team's coding standards, PR conventions, and architecture patterns into every session as persistent context (SessionStart hook).
